title: The National Road Fund(Amendment) Act, 2025

sections.title: This Act may be cited as National Road Fund (Amendment) Short title
sections.body:
Act, 2025, and shall be read as one with the National Road Fund Act No. 13
Act, 2002, in this Act referred to as the principal Act. of 2002

sections.title: The principal Act is amended by the insertion of the Insertion of
sections.body: following new section immediately after section 21: section 21A

sections.title: Despite anything to the contrary contained in any Immunity
sections.body:
other written law, where a judgment or order is obtained from
execution
against the Agency, no execution, attachment, or process of of
any nature shall be issued against the Agency or against the judgement
or order
property of the Agency, but the Director shall cause to be
paid out of the revenue of the Agency, such amounts of money
as may, by judgment or order, be awarded against the Agency
to the person entitled to the money.
Single copies of this Act may be obtained from the Government Printer,
P.O. Box 30136, 10101, Lusaka, Price K4.00 each
